Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants two POWL models representing the hiring process described Model 1 With potential unfairness XOR branch for CommunityAffiliationCheck Model 2 Without unfairness no XOR branch standard CulturalFitCheck for all

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets identify the activities from the text 1 ReceiveApplication or SubmitApplication 2 DataCompletenessCheck Resume Parsing and Initial Data Check 3 RequestMoreInfo 4 SkillAssessment Preliminary Skill Assessment 5 CulturalFitCheck Standard cultural fit evaluation 6 CommunityAffiliationCheck Biased check 7 ManagerialReview 8 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Process flow Start ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck Loop DataCompletenessCheck to if incomplete to RequestMoreInfo to back to DataCompletenessCheck If complete proceed Then SkillAssessment Then XOR branch Model 1 or Direct CulturalFitCheck Model 2 Then ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 With Unfairness Loop between DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo Sequence ReceiveApplication to Loop to SkillAssessment to XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 Without Unfairness Same loop Sequence ReceiveApplication to Loop to SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Loop structure OperatorPOWL Operator LOOP data_check request_info Note The loop operator means execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again So A equals data_check B equals request_info This matches check data if incomplete request info and check again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: XOR structure for Model 1 OperatorPOWL Operator XOR cultural_fit community_check

Text: Partial Order for Model 1 Nodes receive_app loop_node skill_assess xor_node manager_review final_decision Edges receive_app to loop_node loop_node to skill_assess skill_assess to xor_node xor_node to manager_review manager_review to final_decision
